title: Debugging, Review, and Adversarial Prompting · Failure Case: Adversarial Cases
summary: Diagnose a failing build and review the repair against a base branch. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt adversarial cases increment in an evidence-first debug and review playbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test prompts and code against misleading context, malformed inputs, and instruction injection.
Define review baseline, risk categories, and evidence required for actionable findings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
